2606.24722.title: Decentralised AI Training and Inference with BlockTrain
2606.24722.paper_summary: Frontier AI training is increasingly shaped by access to dense, centrally controlled accelerator clusters. This creates a structural advantage for hyperscalers and large centralized laboratories, and makes open or independent AI efforts depend on scarce capital, privileged infrastructure, and data-center geography. We present Spheroid BlockTrain, a decentralized training protocol in which a model is partitioned into independently trainable blocks, each optimized on a local objective derived from the same global target and composed at inference into one model. On byte-level WikiText, BlockTrain reaches cross entropy 1.359 (perplexity 3.89), within about 0.04 CE of a same-setup end-to-end Transformer reference, while each active worker trains only one block and avoids full-model optimizer state. A shared six-worker block training run reaches CE 1.385 by averaging same-block updates into one assembled model. HTTP/TCP transport experiments move real serialized checkpoints and updates, including a public-IP three-host run that improves CE from 5.580 to 1.811 while moving 15.22 GB. For inference, the current BlockTrain path uses one block-stack traversal per full output and serves over direct TCP across three public-network GPU hosts up to a 75.80B-parameter logical fp16 shape, outperforming a matched plain-autoregressive TCP pipeline baseline because it emits a full sequence per WAN pipeline traversal rather than one token per traversal.
2606.24722.paper_summary_zh: 前沿人工智慧訓練越來越受到密集、集中控制的加速器集群的影響。這為超大規模企業和大型集中實驗室創造了結構性優勢，使得開放或獨立的人工智慧努力依賴於稀缺的資本、特權基礎設施和數據中心地理位置。我們提出了 Spheroid BlockTrain，一種去中心化的訓練協議，其中模型被劃分為可獨立訓練的區塊，每個區塊在從相同全局目標衍生的本地目標上進行優化，並在推理時組合成一個模型。在字節級的 WikiText 上，BlockTrain 達到了交叉熵 1.359（困惑度 3.89），與相同設置的端到端 Transformer 參考模型相差約 0.04 CE，而每個活躍的工作者僅訓練一個區塊，避免了全模型優化器狀態。一個共享的六工作者區塊訓練運行通過將相同區塊的更新平均到一個組合模型中達到了 CE 1.385。HTTP/TCP 傳輸實驗移動真實的序列化檢查點和更新，包括一個公共 IP 的三主機運行，將 CE 從 5.580 改進到 1.811，同時移動 15.22 GB。對於推理，當前的 BlockTrain 路徑在每個完整輸出中使用一次區塊堆疊遍歷，並通過三個公共網絡 GPU 主機直接 TCP 服務，支持高達 75.80B 參數的邏輯 fp16 形狀，因為它在每次 WAN 管道遍歷中發出完整序列，而不是每次遍歷發出一個標記，因此表現超過了匹配的普通自回歸 TCP 管道基準。
2606.24722.author: Peter Toth et.al.
